The '''fft''' were a species of small, multi-legged lizards which were the main food source of both the [[Ssi-ruu]]k and [[P'w'eck]] species on [[Lwhekk/Legends|Lwhekk]]. They were often cut open using a ceremonial knife<ref name="TEGtPaM" /> called a [[fft knife]].<ref name="TAB SB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''
